sourceAmbiguity: Duplicate SMS redemptions could be misread as a new continuation attempt.
decisionTaken: ReplayMappedOutcome always maps to the settled receipt and marks secondPathForbidden true.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Replay duplicate mapping must not create a second continuation path.
operationalRisk: Future receipt components must preserve this exact-once mapping.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Assert the shared receipt route consumes duplicateMapsToSettledPath.
